question:
A study takes an SRS from a population of full-term infants. The standard deviation of birth weights in this population is 2 pounds. Calculate $95 \%$ confidence intervals for $\mu$ for samples in which:
(a) $n=81$ and $\bar{x}=6.1$ pounds
(b) $n=36$ and $\bar{x}=7.0$ pounds
(c) $n=9$ and $\bar{x}=5.8$ pounds

meta info.caption: Newborn weight.
meta info.section: 10.2 Confidence Intervals for $\mu$ When $\sigma$ Is Known
